abilityTarget: 抓住“数据尚未成熟”背后的真实监管立场

source.title: Panel Discussion
source.speaker: Jeffrey Summers, MD, and Marc Theoret, MD (FDA panel)
source.description: FDA panel Q&A on when accelerated approval becomes an appropriate development discussion.

coldListenQuestions.label: TOPIC / DECISION
coldListenQuestions.question: 提问者希望FDA在什么开发阶段讨论什么问题？
coldListenQuestions.answer: 是否应在Phase 1前或Phase 1后，与FDA讨论accelerated approval。

coldListenQuestions.label: SPEAKER POSITION
coldListenQuestions.question: 监管者认为在pre-IND/IND阶段直接提出该问题是否合适？
coldListenQuestions.answer: 通常不合适；在项目一开始就要求确认accelerated approval属于premature question。

coldListenQuestions.label: EVIDENCE / DATA
coldListenQuestions.question: 什么样的早期证据可能使讨论变得合理？
coldListenQuestions.answer: 明确靶点、富集且相对同质的人群、清楚的自然史，以及非常强的早期临床反应。

coldListenQuestions.label: RISK / UNCERTAINTY
coldListenQuestions.question: 说话人为什么反对过早聚焦审批路径？
coldListenQuestions.answer: 漂亮的早期结果多数不会成为现实，且团队可能忽略CMC、毒理和基础开发门槛。

coldListenQuestions.label: ACTION / OWNER
coldListenQuestions.question: 项目团队现阶段更应该优先做什么？
coldListenQuestions.answer: 研究科学依据、确认靶点和人群、产生可信数据，并把注意力放回CMC和毒理等关键基础。

secondPassTargets.prompt: 出现了哪些具体数字或比例？
secondPassTargets.hint: 5 complete responses / first 10 patients；94% of the time
would not approach the agency early；that's not reality

secondPassTargets.prompt: 什么条件满足后，立场才可能改变？
secondPassTargets.hint: if we see great data；depending on that data

secondPassTargets.prompt: 说话人把哪个目标与哪些当前重点作了对比？
secondPassTargets.hint: accelerated approval vs CMC / toxicology / appropriate hurdles

secondPassTargets.prompt: 第二位说话人从哪里开始补充？
secondPassTargets.hint: And just to add to that...

blindSpots: premature并不是否定accelerated approval，而是否定现在就把它当作确定路径
great data只是触发进一步讨论的条件，不是监管承诺
说话人用CMC和toxicology把讨论拉回当前阶段真正的开发风险

microClip.transcript: In general, that's a premature question from the get-go. Literally, if we see great data, we're going to probably come to you.
microClip.translation: 一般来说，从项目一开始就问这个问题还为时过早。真正看到很强的数据后，我们很可能会主动与你们讨论。

pronunciation.label: CONTRAST
pronunciation.note: 用条件重音标出立场改变的门槛

speaking.prompt: 合作方希望在一个尚无患者疗效数据的罕见癫痫Phase 1项目中，提前把accelerated approval作为核心BD价值主张。你会如何回应？

prepLabels.label: EVIDENCE
prepLabels.placeholder: 已有数据真正支持什么

prepLabels.label: ACTION / ASK
prepLabels.placeholder: 你建议的下一步或追问

followUps: If the preclinical efficacy is unusually strong, why shouldn't we price in accelerated approval now?
What specific Phase 1 signal would make you change your position?
sentenceFrames: I would separate regulatory ambition from evidence readiness.
The current data support ___, but they do not yet justify ___.
